comment.body:
After reading Alma's comments above I wanted to make a general request: can we all just commit to encourage her and not cast doubt about her posts, calls, etc?  

I think we can all agree that Alma's insights and quant capabilities are truly extraordinary. Beyond that, the level of effort she give is SECOND TO NONE. Yes, we're "clients" of hers but doing this work is a side gig for her and she gives us content that is beyond valuable vs what we pay.  She can be doing lots of better things with her time and I think the vast majority of us would love it if she continued longer vs shorter.  And I think encouraging her would help seal that.

comment.body:
On March 12, 2023, the Board authorized each of the 12 Federal Reserve 
Banks (Reserve Banks) to establish and operate the BTFP.  The BTFP made 
funding available to eligible depository institutions to help ensure that banks had 
the ability to meet the needs of all their depositors.  Under the BTFP, each 
Reserve Bank made loans, on a recourse basis, to eligible depository institution 
borrowers for up to one year, receiving eligible U.S. government securities 
collateral in return.  The BTFP ceased extending credit on March 11, 2024.
